programme.title: Live: Sky Racing 1 Race Morning
programme.desc: Thoroughbreds from Lismore, Riccarton; Greyhound Racing from Shepparton, Q Straight, Cambridge; Harness Racing from Winton.

programme.title: Live: Sky Racing 1 Race Day
programme.desc: Thoroughbreds from Wyong, Lismore, Bendigo, Ipswich, Northam, Riccarton; Greyhound Racing from Richmond Straight, Casino, Shepparton, Shepparton Extra, Warragul, Warrnambool, Q Straight, Mount Gambier, Cambridge; Harness Racing from Tamw...

programme.title: Live: Sky Racing 1 Race Night
programme.desc: Thoroughbreds from Northam, Argentan; Greyhound Racing from Nowra, Wentworth Park, Casino, Warragul, Sandown Park, Warrnambool, Q2 Parklands, Angle Park, Mandurah, Hobart, Warrnambool Extra; Harness Racing from Penrith, Ballarat, Albion ...

programme.title: Live: Sky Racing 1 Late Night
programme.desc: Thoroughbreds from Newcastle, Newmarket, Nottingham, Argentan; Greyhound Racing from Wentworth Park, Sandown Park, Q2 Parklands, Angle Park, Mandurah, Hobart.

programme.title: Top Stories
programme.desc: The host presents some of the latest news stories, current affairs and developments pertaining to economics, politics and sports.

programme.title: World Business Watch
programme.desc: The host presents information pertaining to business and economic developments from around the world and provides updates on current events.

programme.title: Top Stories
programme.desc: The host presents some of the latest news stories, current affairs and developments pertaining to economics, politics and sports.

programme.title: Inside South Asia
programme.desc: The host presents a detailed analysis of the latest news updates and developments pertaining to politics, the economy and socio-cultural affairs in South Asia.

programme.title: Newspoint
programme.desc: The host presents a detailed report on the latest updates and developments in the fields of sports, politics and entertainment from around the world.

programme.title: Speed News
programme.desc: The host presents a quick update on the top stories of the day ranging from politics and business to sports and entertainment.

programme.desc: The host presents some of the latest news stories, current affairs and developments pertaining to economics, politics and sports.

programme.desc: The host presents a detailed account of the rapidly changing climatic conditions across the globe threatening the environment.

programme.title: Business Insights
programme.desc: Financial experts analyse major global market trends and significant economic developments to provide viewers with a comprehensive overview of the international business landscape.

programme.title: WION Dispatch
programme.desc: The host presents the latest political, social, sports and economic updates and speaks about the recent developments from around the world.

programme.title: Wion World Of Sport
programme.desc: The host sheds light on the latest updates and key stories from the world of sports and exclusive interactions with sportspersons among other segments.

programme.title: Wion Live Broadcast from USA
programme.desc: The host presents the latest news updates and developments pertaining to significant social, political and economic events from the USA, live.

programme.desc: The host presents an in-depth analysis of the latest updates about the political and socio-economic developments of West Asia.

programme.desc: The host sheds light on the latest global news updates and developments pertaining to politics, economy and sociocultural affairs.

programme.desc: The host, a professional journalist, presents an in-depth analysis of international news and developments regarding social and economic issues.

programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.title: The Sea Inside Her
programme.desc: Grandma must keep her Grandchild safe as her biggest fears try to interrupt their bedtime routine. 2024. NZ. Starring: Mateo Cruz, Alex Leonhartsburger. Directors: Alyx Duncan.

programme.title: Janet Planet
programme.desc: Lacy spends summer at home with her mother Janet. Her wild imagination captivates everyone around her. 2023. USA, UK. Director: Annie Baker. Starring: Zoe Ziegler, Luke Philip Bosco.

programme.title: Kung-Fu Master!
programme.desc: A mother in her forties finds herself falling into an intense romanic affair with a 14-year-old boy. 1988. France. Director: Agnes Varda. Starring: Jane Birkin, Mathieu Demy.

programme.title: Chaplin's Modern Times: The Path of Silence.
programme.desc: The end of the 'silent film' era turned Charlie Chaplin's world on his head, follow his rebelion against modern cinema. 2024. France. Director: Gregory Monro.

programme.title: The People's Joker
programme.desc: An aspiring clown grappling with her gender identity combats a fascistic caped crusader. 2022. USA. Director: Vera Drew. Starring: Vera Drew, Lynn Downey, Kane Distler.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: Yeung's behaviour reminds Ming of his own infamous rise to fame. 2003. Hong Kong, China. Directors: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Andy Lau, Tony Leung Chiu-wai.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: Antidote
programme.desc: In this urgently topical documentary, a whistle blowers from inside Russia's poison program risks his life to expose Vladimir Putin's authoritarian regime. 2024. USA. Director: James Jones.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/1. Vinnie's new acquaintance accuses him of stealing a prized possession, so the gang go on a wild goose chase to find the real culprits. 2024. UK. Director: Ben Gregor. Starring: Joe Gilgun.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/2. Davey and Donna MacDonagh sniff an opportunity with Manolito's absence and make moves on his turf. 2024. UK. Director: Ben Gregor. Starring: Joe Gilgun.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/3. Farmer Jim is forced on a bumpy trip down memory lane when an old flame pops up in Hawley. 2024. UK. Director: Ben Gregor. Starring: Joe Gilgun, Michelle Keegan.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/4. Tommo helps his new friend, literally, get his groove back. Vinnie and the gang rescue Gideon from the clutch of a naked cult. 2024. UK. Director: Richard Signy. Starring: Joe Gilgun.

programme.title: Brian And Maggie
programme.desc: Brian Walden's infamous interview with Margaret Thatcher that catalysed her resignation. 2025. UK. Director: Stephen Frears. Starring: Steve Coogan, Harriet Walter, Ross Armstrong.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Fwends
programme.desc: Two friends reconnect over the course of a weekend, navigating what it means to be a woman. 2025. Australia. Director: Sophie Somerville. Starring: Melissa Gan, Emmanuelle Mattana.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: Yeung's behaviour reminds Ming of his own infamous rise to fame. 2003. Hong Kong, China. Directors: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Andy Lau, Tony Leung Chiu-wai.

programme.title: Medicine
programme.desc: Two backpackers in India offer to nurse a baby while the Grandmother steps off the bus, but the bus keeps moving . 2023. NZ. Director: William McKegg. Starring: George Mason, Phoenix Connolly.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/1. Elvira works as a receptionist at a brothel. When a prostitute goes missing, Elvira feels an urge to investigate. 2022. Denmark. Director: Heidi Maria Faisst. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/2. While babysitting Candy's son, Elvira ventures into unfamiliar territory. 2022. Denmark. Directors: Heidi Maria Faisst, Oliver Ussing. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: Gondola
programme.desc: Two female cable car operators fall in love as they pass each other in their gondolas. 2023. Germany. Director: Veit Helmer. Starring: Nino Soselia, Mathilde Irrmann.

programme.title: Young Werther
programme.desc: Despite her engagement, Werther turns his life upside-down to win Charlotte's heart. 2024. Canada. Director: Jose Avelino Gilles Corbett Lourenco. Starring: Patrick J. Adams, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: A desperate fugitive takes a family hostage with a live grenade at the turn of the millennium. 2026. Greece. Director: Sherif Francis. Starring: Orfeas Avgoustidis, Maria Nafpliotou.

programme.title: Unsane
programme.desc: A young girl is admitted to a mental institution where she faces her biggest fear, is it real or is it all in her head? 2018. USA. Director: Steven Soderbergh. Starring: Claire Foy, Joshua Leonard.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/5. Some unwelcome arrivals put a strain on Cardi and Carol's marriage. 2024. UK. Director: Richard Signy. Starring: Joe Gilgun, Dominic West.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/6. Ashley trains for a fight to reinstate his tough reputation. Erin returns and the gang make a plan to rob her horrible bosses. 2024. UK. Director: Richard Signy. Starring: Joe Gilgun.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 6/7. Vinnie and the gang plan the perfect funeral. Davey MacDonagh teeters on the edge in his power struggle with McCann. 2024. UK. Director: Richard Signy. Starring: Joe Gilgun, Dominic West.

programme.title: Brassic: Christmas Special
programme.desc: When plans go awry over the festive period, Vinnie and the gang must rescue Christmas from the brink of catastrophe. 2023. UK. Director: John Hardwick. Starring: Joe Gilgun.

programme.title: Heaven & Earth
programme.desc: The true story of a young woman from a small Vietnamese village ravaged by war who encounters a US marine. 1993. France, USA. Director: Oliver Stone. Starring: Hiep Thi Le, Tommy Lee Jones.

programme.title: Gondola
programme.desc: Two female cable car operators fall in love as they pass each other in their gondolas. 2023. Germany. Director: Veit Helmer. Starring: Nino Soselia, Mathilde Irrmann.

programme.title: Young Werther
programme.desc: Despite her engagement, Werther turns his life upside-down to win Charlotte's heart. 2024. Canada. Director: Jose Avelino Gilles Corbett Lourenco. Starring: Patrick J. Adams, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Between The Temples
programme.desc: A greif-stricken cantor is in a crisis of faith when his grade-school music teacher re-enters his life. 2024. USA. Director: Nathan Silver. Starring: Jason Schwartzman, Carol Kane.

programme.title: Medicine
programme.desc: Two backpackers in India offer to nurse a baby while the Grandmother steps off the bus, but the bus keeps moving . 2023. NZ. Director: William McKegg. Starring: George Mason, Phoenix Connolly.

programme.title: Heaven & Earth
programme.desc: The true story of a young woman from a small Vietnamese village ravaged by war who encounters a US marine. 1993. France, USA. Director: Oliver Stone. Starring: Hiep Thi Le, Tommy Lee Jones.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/3. In her quest to find Candy, Elvira devises a daring scheme. 2022. Denmark. Directors: Heidi Maria Faisst, Oliver Ussing. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: Elvira
programme.desc: 1/4. Sun has been sent over to Zora, but Elvira realises he may be in danger. 2022. Denmark. Director: Samanou Acheche Sahlstrom. Starring: Sara Klein Larsen.

programme.title: The House Within
programme.desc: This feature-length documentary draws a contemplative portrait of the kiwi writer Fiona Kidman and her inner world. 2024. NZ. Director: Joshua Prendeville.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/3. Guests stage a send-off for the victim, Scotland Yard find motive. 2025. Belgium. Directors: Hans Herbots, Matthias Lebeer. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/4. New guests arrive, bringing no manners and more stress. 2025. Belgium. Directors: Hans Herbots, Matthias Lebeer. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time Michel Legrand
programme.desc: Rising to fame through the French New Wave, Michel Legrand's story is told with never-before-seen archives and personal accounts. 2024. France. Director: David Dessites.

programme.title: The Last Night of Amore
programme.desc: Franco is preparing for his retirement speech when he's called to investigate a crime scene. 2023. Italy. Director: Andrea Di Stefano. Starring: Pierfrancesco Favino, Linda Caridi.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 7/1. Vinnie gathers the crew to remind the new gang who the big dog in town is. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Jordan Hogg. Starring: Joe Gilgun, Michelle Keegan.

programme.title: Brassic
programme.desc: 7/2. Tommo visits Germany to visit his son Hans, scheming to get Hans' grandparents to bankroll a new pub. 2025. United Kingdom. Director: Leon Lopez. Starring: Ulli Ackermann, Kayode Akinyemi.

programme.title: The Bibi Files
programme.desc: Uncover the corruption charges against the Israeli Prime Minister through leaked polic interrogation videos. 2024. USA. Director: Alexis Bloom.

programme.title: Lost Boys And Fairies
programme.desc: 1/1. Queer performance artist Gabriel and his partner Andy long to adopt a child. 2024. UK. Director: James Kent. Starring: Sion Daniel Young, Fra Fee.

programme.title: Lost Boys And Fairies
programme.desc: 1/2. With preparations for the adoption under way, a tragic event changes this new-found family's life forever. 2024. UK. Director: James Kent. Starring: Sion Daniel Young.

programme.title: Lost Boys And Fairies
programme.desc: 1/3. The repercussions of a catastrophic event sends Gabe spiralling, and the adoption is put into jeopardy. 2024. UK. Director: James Kent. Starring: Sion Daniel Young.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time Michel Legrand
programme.desc: Rising to fame through the French New Wave, Michel Legrand's story is told with never-before-seen archives and personal accounts. 2024. France. Director: David Dessites.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/3. Guests stage a send-off for the victim, Scotland Yard find motive. 2025. Belgium. Directors: Hans Herbots, Matthias Lebeer. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: This Is Not A Murder Mystery
programme.desc: 1/4. New guests arrive, bringing no manners and more stress. 2025. Belgium. Directors: Hans Herbots, Matthias Lebeer. Starring: Pierre Gervais, Stephen Tompkinson.

programme.title: The Bibi Files
programme.desc: Uncover the corruption charges against the Israeli Prime Minister through leaked polic interrogation videos. 2024. USA. Director: Alexis Bloom.

programme.title: Show Home
programme.desc: Explore the failures of the human condition, sometimes you must go down before you can go back up. 2023. NZ. Director: Jane Shearer. Starring: Miriama McDowell, Kip Chapman.

programme.title: The House Within
programme.desc: This feature-length documentary draws a contemplative portrait of the kiwi writer Fiona Kidman and her inner world. 2024. NZ. Director: Joshua Prendeville.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time Michel Legrand
programme.desc: Rising to fame through the French New Wave, Michel Legrand's story is told with never-before-seen archives and personal accounts. 2024. France. Director: David Dessites.

programme.title: Flathead
programme.desc: Cass finds himself drawn to his childhood home on a spiritual quest for redemption. 2024. Australia. Director: Jaydon Martin. Starring: Cass Cumerford, Miguel Angel Jitale D'Amico.

programme.title: Niki
programme.desc: Niki de Saint Phalle arrives in Paris, escaping the strain of 1950's US to find freedom in art. 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Celine Sallette. Starring: Charlotte Le Bon, John Robinson.

programme.title: Omniscient Reader: The Prophecy
programme.desc: Dokja's favourite Apocalyptic novel becomes reality, and only he knows how to survive. 2025. South Korea. Director: Byung-woo Kim. Starring: Ahn Hyo-seop, Lee Min-ho.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/5. Maggie's hopes for her brother actualise, Kai is alive, however, his confessions upset her. 2024. Germany. Director: Christian Alvart. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: The Blind Sea
programme.desc: Australian surfer, Matt Formston achieves world records out on the ocean, dispite only having 3% vision. 2024. Australia. Director: Daniel Fenech.
